title: Geepas Mechanical Bathroom Scale | Body Weight Scale with 130KG/287lb Capacity | Large Platform with Non-Slip Feet, Easy to Read Dial, No Batteries Required | Weigh In kg/lbs, Black
features: ✅ ACCURATE WEIGHT MEASUREMENT: This mechanical bathroom scale provides precise weight readings up to 130 kg (286 lbs), ensuring reliable measurements for individuals of varying weights.
✅ LARGE, EASY-TO-READ DIAL: Featuring a clear, large analog dial with high-contrast markings, this scale ensures effortless readability.
✅ STURDY AND DURABLE BUILD: Crafted from robust materials, this scale is designed to withstand daily use while maintaining its accuracy and reliability over time.
✅ NON-SLIP SURFACE: The textured surface provides stability and prevents slips, offering a secure platform for users while stepping on and off the scale.
✅ SLEEK AND SPACE-SAVING DESIGN: Its compact and makes it an ideal fit for smaller bathrooms, allowing for convenient storage when not in use.

✅ NO BATTERIES REQUIRED: Operating without batteries, this mechanical scale ensures continuous functionality & precise measurements you need, without the need for power sources or frequent replacements.
✅ STYLISH AND TIMELESS APPEARANCE: Its classic design complements any bathroom decor, adding a touch of elegance to the space.
✅ EASY TO USE: Simply stepping on the weight scales for people will provide you with a precise and extremely accurate reading in either kg or lbs.
